result:
@hewn v0 hybrid
G: diagnose_and_fix_node_memory_leak
C: long_running_process ∧ heap_grows_over_time ∧ node_runtime
P: run_with("--inspect") ∧ capture_heap_snapshots_at_intervals ∧ diff_snapshots_in_chrome_devtools ∧ identify_retained_objects ∧ trace_retainer_chain_to_root ∧ common_culprits("closures,timers,event_listeners,global_caches,unbounded_maps") ∧ fix_retention("remove_listeners,clear_timers,bound_caches_with_lru,weakref_or_weakmap") ∧ verify_with_autocannon_or_loadtest ∧ monitor_rss_and_heap_used
V: heap_used_stabilizes_under_load ∧ rss_flat_after_warmup ∧ snapshot_diff_shows_no_unbounded_growth
A: use("clinic.js_doctor") ∧ use("heapdump") ∧ use("--max-old-space-size_only_as_bandaid") ∧ set("NODE_OPTIONS=--expose-gc") ∧ avoid_global_mutable_state
